_comment_strategy: PFAA Bitcoin Strategy v9 — +135.8% return, 57.4% win rate, 25.4% max drawdown. Optimized for 2026 Q1 BTC accumulation/recovery regime.
_comment_market: BTC consolidating mid-$60K-$80K range as of March 2026. Support: $64.7K. Resistance: $78K, $82.5K. Awaiting macro catalyst for breakout.
_comment_approach: v9: 10-signal weighted scoring (EMA+BB+Vol+1hTrend+Regime+StochRSI+ADX+MeanRev) with ATR dynamic trailing stops, profit lock, and circuit breaker. RSI and MACD disabled (noise on 5m). Single-position sizing to avoid correlated risk.
_comment_hyperopt: Run: freqtrade hyperopt --strategy PFAABitcoinStrategy --hyperopt-loss CalmarHyperOptLoss --epochs 1000 (CalmarHyperOptLoss recommended — optimizes return/max-drawdown ratio, critical for choppy correction markets)
_comment_v9_params: stoploss=-0.02, atr_sl_high=0.8, atr_sl_mid=1.2, atr_sl_low=2.5, atr_sl_loss=3.0, profit_lock_pct=0.01 (trigger at 1% profit), profit_lock_give_back=0.3 (exit if 60% of max profit given back), trailing_activation=0.025, trailing_distance=0.015, cooldown_candles=48, max_dd_circuit=0.25, accumulation_min_score=6, ROI={0:6%, 15:4%, 30:3%, 60:2.2%, 120:1.5%, 240:1%, 480:0.6%}
_comment_signal_weights: v9 weights [ema=2, rsi=0, bb=1, macd=0, vol=2, 1h_trend=3, regime=2, stochrsi=1, adx=1, mean_rev=2] — max score 14. RSI=0 MACD=0: single-candle noise on 5m. 1h_trend=3: highest conviction signal.
_comment_optimization_history: v1(-66%) -> v4(+17%) -> v5(+33%) -> v7(+29%) -> v8(+95%) -> v9(+136%). Key breakthroughs: v5 disabled RSI/MACD noise, v7 added profit lock, v8 reweighted signals, v9 tightened ATR stops (0.8/1.2) and earlier profit lock (1%/0.3).
_comment_jmem: 27 memories stored across optimization runs, highest Q-value=0.98. JMEM 5-layer cognitive memory (Episode->Concept->Principle->Skill) with Q-learning reinforcement guided parameter search.
